message:
fix: circuit breaker reset race, health watch atomicity, RTT overflow

Three bugs found during deep code review of recent agent changes:

1. HIGH: combinator/circuit_breaker.rs reset() used unconditional store()
   which could silently overwrite a concurrent HalfOpen→Open transition
   from record_failure(), closing the circuit despite a probe failure.
   Fixed with CAS loop matching the approach in error/recovery.rs.

2. MEDIUM: grpc/health.rs HealthWatcher read status and version in two
   separate lock acquisitions, allowing a concurrent set_status() to
   interleave and cause the watcher to record a stale status with an
   advanced version — permanently missing the real transition.
   Fixed by: (a) adding watched_status_and_version() that reads both
   under a single lock, (b) holding statuses lock across version bump
   in set_status/clear/clear_status.

3. LOW: net/quic_native/transport.rs RTT EWMA used plain multiplication
   (3 * rttvar, 7 * srtt) which overflows u64 for extreme values.
   Fixed with saturating_mul, matching the module's existing style.

Also fixes TraceData::Worker pattern match for new decision_seq/replay_hash
fields in runtime/state.rs and lab/oracle/determinism.rs.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
